text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon and I are on our way home after
a day out and about.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. What would you consider to be "precious
memories" that we share?
choice_data_list: Why are you asking all of a sudden?
Why are you asking all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Well...
She tells me the topic came up in class earlier.

Apparently, everyone had some kind of precious
memory they shared with their trainer. On the
other hand, Mihono Bourbon was confused.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: What does "precious" mean?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm unable to adequately comprehend its
definition.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Precious" means something of value... Something
you do not want to break.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, how is that related to memories?
Memories are not tangible things that can be
broken.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
What makes a memory "precious" is something I
am unable to quantify.
choice_data_list: Nothing just pops into your head?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pops into my head?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Error. Due to an innumerable amount of search
results for memories, I am unable to narrow it
down to only "precious" ones.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I've determined that obtaining a better
understanding of "precious" is necessary before
searching my memory logs.

She seems like she still can't understand what
makes a memory precious. In that case, there's
only one thing left to do.
choice_data_list:
Then let's make a ton of new memories
together!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You wish to create even more memories in order
to help me understand what makes them
"precious"?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see... Simply put, experiencing the feeling in real
time may be the fastest way to achieve
comprehension...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood.

The following evening, Mihono Bourbon and I
visit the park.
choice_data_list: Is there something you want to do here?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Many of the other students' precious memories
were related to receiving advice from their
trainers.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based upon that, I've deduced that the perfect
conditions for discussing my troubles are "in the
evening," "at a park," and "alone together."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That is why I brought you here.
choice_data_list:
If there's ever anything bothering you, I'm
always here to listen.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I believe I am "at a loss." I apologize. I do not
have any particular troubles.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Failure. Moving to next method.
choice_data_list: Why don't we try doing something fun?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Fun at the park... Do you mean you wish to play
tag?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. Now, who will be "it" first?

For whatever reason, Mihono Bourbon and I end
up playing tag together at the park.

It goes without saying that I'll be tagged in an
instant if she's "it," and she'll never get tagged if
I'm "it."

The results are obvious from the start.
Unfortunately, this won't end up as a precious
memory.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Failure.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I detect what is known as "labored breathing." I
suggest you rest immediately.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: We can continue creating memories next time.

Today is a complete bust. I should probably come
up with my own plans for next time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Try harder? Isn't that what I should be doing?
choice_data_list: Well, we're making these memories together.
Well, we're making these memories together.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Understood. Thank you for your assistance,
Trainer.

Mihono Bourbon gazes at me intently as she
offers her words of thanks, and we make a
promise to create our own precious memories.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. As you wish, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have detected a decline in your stamina. It
appears that walking is causing you difficulty.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will carry you to a bench.

I sit down on a bench and let out a deep sigh. The
expression on Mihono Bourbon's face tells me
that she wants to say something.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer, I have failed to achieve my goal today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
To make matters worse, I have caused you to
become physically exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps the day's events will become an
"unpleasant" memory for you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: Regardless of the outcome, this is a memory.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I... I see. Thank you very much.

Mihono Bourbon thanks me and smiles at the
prospect of trying to make precious memories
again.

She looks down for a moment as if deep in
thought before giving me a small nod.
